description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

pattern_alerts.description: Geopolitical binary underweighting — markets price best-case scenarios sooner than consensus forecasts
Defense sector duration premium — maximized in 2-6 week ceasefire (managed tension), not instant peace

When Trump announces a FUTURE strike deadline (vs. immediate action), crude markets interpret as de-escalation — Brent declines 3-5%. Seen April 10: announcement of April 22 deadline caused Brent to fall from $96.51 to $91-93 intraday.
pattern_alerts.status: OBSERVING — needs 1 more for framework promotion

framework_updates_implemented.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
framework_updates_implemented.rule: For any 3-outcome binary forecast, include explicit REVERSAL TRIGGER: 'If best-case materializes → regime flips, index +2-4%'. Do not rely on probability weighting alone.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Before making defense stock predictions, model the DURATION of tension. 2-6 weeks managed tension = HOLD/ADD defense. Instant peace = REDUCE defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes then reverses.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Central Bank Calendar Synchronization
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Always check RBI/Fed meeting calendar when forecasting on binary geopolitical event days. Same-day policy decisions can amplify moves by 1-2%.

DII buys to support market. Ceasefire rallies driven purely by DIIs are structurally fragile. 2 occurrences confirmed — READY FOR FRAMEWORK PROMOTION at Sunday weekly review.

prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}} (Monday, April 14, 2026). FIRST WEEK AFTER ISLAMABAD TALKS.

FIRST ACTION — Check for weekend geopolitical news:
- Search 'US Iran ceasefire weekend April 12-13 2026' for any ceasefire stress
- Check 'Lebanon Israel strikes weekend April 2026'
- If no adverse news: REGIME STABLE (DE-ESCALATION_TALKS_CONTINUING)
- If ceasefire breach/major escalation: apply WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN regime

SECOND: P012 and P013 CHECK DATES TODAY
- P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080): Check date TODAY. Stock at ~₹1,012 on April 10. Will close above ₹1,050? Confirm opening and live price.
- P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100): WILL SCORE WRONG. Confirm IndiGo price and score immediately.

THIRD: TCS recovery check
- TCS at ₹2,539.80 on April 10. P018 threshold ₹2,600 — is TCS recovering? Check opening price.
- P022 (TCS ₹2,600 by April 17) — 7 days total, 4 trading days remaining.

FOURTH: A005 SETFGOLD — confirm if exit executed. If not, execute at market open (₹124-128 range, sell 50-75%).

APRIL 14 FORECAST CONTEXT:
- Regime: DE-ESCALATION_TALKS_CONTINUING
- Nifty: 24,050 (April 10 close) — P016 range tracking
- Key support: 23,900 | Key resistance: 24,200
- Brent: $95.95 — below $100 regime alert
- FII trend: 2 consecutive selling days (₹2,811 + ₹1,711 Cr) — watch provisional April 10 data

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine.
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context.

CRITICAL CHECKS FOR THIS EOD RUN (April 14):
1. SCORE P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100) — WILL SCORE WRONG. Update accuracy-meta.json and predictions-history.json.
2. SCORE P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080) — CHECK DATE. Confirm April 14 close. Score RIGHT or WRONG.
3. TCS April 14 close — P018 and P022 progress? Recovery toward ₹2,600?
4. Nifty April 14 close — P016 range (23,900-24,100) intact?
5. ADANI PORTS April 14 close — P019 on track?
6. A005 SETFGOLD — was partial exit executed? If not, execute immediately and flag.
7. FII April 10-12 official data — trend confirmation?
8. Any weekend geopolitical developments — regime change needed?

STEPS:
1. Search for weekend geopolitical news + April 14 closes for all relevant stocks
2. Score P013 (WRONG confirmed) and P012 (actual close determines RIGHT/WRONG)
3. Update accuracy-meta.json with 2 new scored predictions
4. Update all open prediction confidences
5. Generate April 15 session forecast (multiple prediction check dates)
6. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/2026-04-14-eod.md
7. Update next-run-context.json (LAST STEP)

NOTE: April 15 is the next trading day. P015 (INDIGO >₹4,150) WILL SCORE RIGHT. P016 (Nifty range), P018 (TCS >₹2,600), P019 (ADANI PORT), P020 (SETFGOLD) all check on April 15.

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine.
